title: cyperus ferax subsp. engelmannii
intro: Cyperus ferax subsp. engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's papyrus sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and treating respiratory issues. Engelmann's papyrus sedge can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
